betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Steam Turbine§f:
The Steam Turbine (nuclearcraft:turbine_controller) is a multiblock power generator that converts high-pressure steam (or low-pressure steam, or regular steam) into RF power. It is the primary heat-to-RF conversion stage for nuclear reactors.

§6Multiblock Structure (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:364-370)§f:
A Steam Turbine is built as a vertical column with:
- Turbine Controller (top) — pattern "STS / TFT / STS" with HSLA Steel + Tough Alloy + Steel Frame
- Turbine Casing (8 per craft) — pattern " S / SFS / S " with HSLA Steel + Steel Frame
- Turbine Rotor Shaft (4 per craft) — pattern "SSS / TTT / SSS" with HSLA Steel + Tough Alloy
- Turbine Rotor Blades — Steel (4 per craft) or Extreme Alloy (4 per craft)
- Turbine Glass (decorative transparent casing)

§6What It Does (TurbineRecipes.java:17-19)§f:
The Turbine accepts fluid input and outputs lower-energy fluid + RF:
- §bHigh-Pressure Steam§f (1mB) → Exhaust Steam (4mB) + RF (turbine_power_per_mb[0])
- §bLow-Pressure Steam§f (1mB) → Low Quality Steam (2mB) + RF (turbine_power_per_mb[1])
- §bSteam§f (1mB) → Low Quality Steam (2mB) + RF (turbine_power_per_mb[2])

§6Turbine Mechanics (TurbineRecipes.java:23-31)§f:
The Turbine has three configurable stats:
- §bPower per mB§f: how much RF each mB of input fluid produces
- §bExpansion Level§f: how much the fluid expands (multiplier on output volume)
- §bSpin-up Multiplier§f: how quickly the rotor reaches full speed

§6High-Pressure Steam (FissionHeatingRecipes.java:14-15)§f:
The optimal input is High-Pressure Steam. It is produced by the Fission Heating system:
- Water (1mB) → High-Pressure Steam (4mB) at 64 RF/mB heat input
- Preheated Water (1mB) → High-Pressure Steam (4mB) at 32 RF/mB (more efficient)

The Preheated Water path is fed by a §bHeat Exchanger§f that captures waste heat from the reactor's NaK coolant loop.

§6Direct Descendants of Turbine Controller (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 4 items that use the Turbine Controller or are downstream of it:
- Tough Alloy Ingot (used in the controller recipe)
- HSLA Steel Ingot (used in the controller recipe)
- Redstone Comparator (used as a control interface)
- ncsteamadditions:steam_turbine (an external addon for higher-tier steam turbine)

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30043 (Solid Fission Reactor) — the heat source for the steam cycle.

§eTip§f: Always preheat water before sending it to the Fission Heater. The preheated-water path uses half the heat per mB of High-Pressure Steam produced, doubling your effective RF output.

§eTip§f: For maximum power, use Extreme Alloy rotor blades. They spin up faster and handle higher throughput than Steel blades.

§cWarning§f: A spinning turbine with no load (no fluid input) will eventually overspeed and explode. Always ensure fluid input is present before activating.
